content.text:
To help you configure the LLM, please provide a value for the required parameter:

- **max_tokens**: The maximum number of tokens to generate (must be a positive number greater than 0).

For example, you could say something like:
> "Set max_tokens to 1024"

Here are some common values to consider:
| max_tokens | Use Case |
|---|---|
| 256 | Short responses (e.g., Q&A, chatbot replies) |
| 512 | Medium-length responses |
| 1024 | Longer, more detailed responses |
| 2048+ | Extended content generation (e.g., articles, stories) |

Just let me know your preferred value and I'll configure it right away!

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate
